# Missoula.business

> AI and automation consulting for Missoula, Montana businesses.

## About

Missoula.business is operated by J. Scott Chapman, founder of Ravenview Services, a Missoula-based technology consulting firm with over nine years of experience. The mission is simple: help machines do machine work so humans can do human work.

We help local businesses leverage artificial intelligence and automation to eliminate busy work, replace manual processes, and gain a competitive edge — so they can focus on what their business actually does.

## Services

- AI Strategy: Identifying where artificial intelligence delivers real value for your specific business.
- Process Automation: Eliminating repetitive, manual tasks to reduce errors and free up your team.
- System Integration: Connecting disparate tools and platforms into seamless workflows.
- Custom Software Development: Building tailored applications when off-the-shelf solutions fall short.
- Technical Consulting: Advising on technology decisions with clear ROI projections.

## Approach

1. Conversation — Understand the business, its pain points, and goals.
2. Diagnosis — Map workflows and identify highest-impact opportunities.
3. Solution — Build, deploy, and train your team.
4. Results — Measure time saved, errors eliminated, and revenue gained.

## Who This Is For

Any Missoula-area business dealing with:
- Repetitive manual tasks consuming staff time
- Disconnected systems creating information silos
- Processes prone to human error
- A desire to use technology for competitive advantage

Industries served include professional services, retail, construction, healthcare, and more.

## Contact

- Email: scott@ravenviewservices.com
- Location: Missoula, Montana
- Website: https://missoula.business
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rvnvw/
- Parent company: https://ravenviewservices.com

## FAQ

Q: Do I need to understand AI to work with you?
A: No. We take a business-first approach — we understand your challenges, then handle the technology.

Q: What does it cost?
A: Every engagement starts with a free conversation. Solutions are scoped to your needs and budget, always targeting measurable ROI.

Q: How long does a project take?
A: Some automations deliver in days. Larger custom builds run weeks to a few months, with iterative delivery so you see results early.
